hero.findHomesSub: Discover verified hostels and housing near your school.
hero.trustedByLandlordsSub: We connect students to safe, affordable homes.
hero.moveInConfidenceSub: Enjoy stress-free renting and move-in support.

about.heading: About LodgeLink
about.intro: For many students in Nigeria, securing safe, affordable, and genuine accommodation, especially in a new city, remains a major challenge. From unverified agents to inflated prices and misleading listings, finding a suitable lodge near campus can feel overwhelming.
about.solution: Is built to change that. We connect students directly with trusted landlords and pre-verified housing options near campuses. No more scams, no more guesswork, just clear listings and peace of mind.
about.peaceOfMind: Beyond listings, LodgeLink supports students with reliable communication and a smooth rental process, so they feel informed, protected, and at home from the start.
about.vision: To evolve into a full-service housing and real estate platform that helps young people rent, buy, and settle with confidence.

1.title: Create an Account
1.desc: Sign up for free and complete your student profile.

2.title: Browse Verified Listings
2.desc: Explore a wide range of pre-approved hostels near your campus.

3.title: Chat With Landlords
3.desc: Message property owners directly and ask questions before booking.

4.title: Book & Move In
4.desc: Secure your space and move in with confidence.

1.title: Register & Verify
1.desc: Sign up, complete your landlord profile, and verify your property.

2.title: List Your Property
2.desc: Upload photos, set pricing, and describe amenities clearly.

3.title: Respond to Students
3.desc: Receive inquiries, chat with students, and schedule viewings.

4.title: Confirm & Get Paid
4.desc: Approve bookings and receive payments securely through the platform.

footer.aboutText: LodgeLink helps students find verified, affordable housing near campus. We make moving easier, safer, and smarter.
